group_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1

columns.column_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
columns.extraction_plan: The class of agents in Treatment Arm 1 (Darolutamide + ADT + Docetaxel) is reported in the abstract and introduction. Darolutamide is an androgen receptor pathway inhibitor, ADT is androgen-deprivation therapy (a type of hormonal therapy), and docetaxel is a chemotherapy agent.
columns.column_name_raw: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
